description: Ground truth dataset for AutoAxionLimits extraction pipeline evaluation. Each entry is a paper with manually verified extraction results.

papers.notes: Multi-coupling: also constrains f_a-m_a plane from SN1987A bounds
Multi-coupling: also discusses f_a plane for haloscope projections
Multi-coupling: also discusses dark photon absorption in semiconductors
Multi-coupling: SN1987A constrains both nucleon flavors
Multi-coupling: proposal also covers axion-electron coupling
Multi-coupling: also discusses g_an sensitivity for CASPEr-Electric
Multi-coupling: paper constrains g_agamma via Primakoff in globular clusters
Multi-coupling: Eotwash EP test also constrains scalar-nucleon Yukawa fifth force
